description:
You are an observability engineer working inside the project directory tree located under /home/user/observability.  
    A set of historical Grafana dashboards lives in  
    /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023  
  
    To speed-up your workflow you have decided to expose those archived dashboards directly in the dashboards root folder via a symbolic link called old_templates.  
  
    Requirements that will be automatically checked:  
    1. Create a *symbolic link* located at  
       /home/user/observability/dashboards/old_templates  
       that points to  
       /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023  
       • The link itself must be named exactly “old_templates” (no file-extension, no additional path components).  
       • It must resolve (using readlink -f) to the absolute path shown above.  
    2. Produce a log file located at  
       /home/user/observability/verification.log  
       containing **exactly one line** (ending with a single newline) whose content is the canonical target path of the new link, i.e.  
  
       /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023  
  
       No extra spaces, additional lines, or additional text are allowed.  
  
    The automated grader will verify both the existence and correctness of the symbolic link and the exact contents of the verification.log file.  
    Perform whatever terminal interactions you need, but be sure the final filesystem state matches the two points above.
truth:
# Pre-existing items before the agent starts
    Directory: /home/user/observability
    Directory: /home/user/observability/dashboards
    Directory: /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive
    Directory: /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023
    File:      /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023/performance_dashboard.json  
               (contents unimportant for this task)

    # Expected items after successful completion
    Symlink: /home/user/observability/dashboards/old_templates  
             -> /home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023

    File: /home/user/observability/verification.log  
          Contents (single line, terminating with newline):  
          “/home/user/observability/dashboards/archive/2023\n”
